---
title: "Manuscript Title"
author: "Author Name"
date: today
bibliography: references.bib
format:
  docx: default
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    keep-tex: true
---

# Introduction

Placeholder — content will be drafted by the academic-writer skill.

# Methods

Placeholder — content will be drafted by the academic-writer skill.

# Results

Placeholder — content will be drafted by the academic-writer skill.

# Discussion

Placeholder — content will be drafted by the academic-writer skill.
